 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Midway Handicap

1600m
Class: 3-Y-O & Up, BM72, Handicap
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

Can't imagine one of the top two not winning. OTONO will come to hand quickly and a winner when last second-up at Orange, a close top selection. MONKHANA metro winner at Rosehill Gardens and placed in all other outings this preparation, if in the finish no surprise. CLAIM THE CROWN placed at long odds last start at Warwick Farm when first up and comes back to race in the city on a Saturday, in with a chance. KINGSTON CHARM narrowly beaten at long odds last start at Rosehill Gardens and has two placings from four runs this prep at metro level, could threaten.

Selections

  • 9. Otono (8) $13.80
  • 4. Monkhana (1) $4.20
  • 1. Claim The Crown (10) $19.00
  • 2. Kingston Charm (9) $9.60
